arts.ttl: Thursday's FA Cup predictions including Everton vs. Peterborough United
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's FA Cup fixtures, including Everton vs. Peterborough United.

arts.ttl: Bournemouth taunts ring true for Everton supporters as Friedkin Group sent fresh plea
arts.sum: Our Everton jury have their say on the big talking points from Goodison Park after the defeat to Bournemouth

arts.ttl: Ipswich beat Everton to £21m Aston Villa star Jaden Philogene - just SIX MONTHS after he returned to his boyhood side on a five-year deal
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: The 22-year old was also wanted by Everton but Ipswich have moved quickly to agree terms and Philogene has agreed to the move after speaking to Kieran McKenna.

arts.ttl: Sean Dyche makes humbling admission as Ashley Young prepares to face son Tyler in FA Cup
arts.sum: Sean Dyche played alongside Ashley Young when he made his debut at Watford aged 18 and now the former England winger could face his son Tyler when Everton meet Peterborough United in the FA Cup

arts.ttl: Everton sign Ladd from Manchester United
arts.sum: Everton sign Wales international Hayley Ladd from Manchester United for an undisclosed fee.

arts.ttl: Graham Potter agrees to join West Ham after Julen Lopetegui sacking and Everton 'talks'
arts.sum: A report claims Graham Potter has agreed to become West Ham United's new head coach after they confirmed Julen Lopetegui's sacking

arts.ttl: Friedkin Group latest as new Everton owners make first major move to boost finances
arts.sum: The Friedkin Group are reportedly in discussions with JP Morgan Chase & Co. over raising £300m of debt

arts.ttl: Everton and Friedkin Group face defining few months if PSR is to become problem of past
arts.sum: PSR has hung over Everton for the last 18 months but the club is finally starting to get clear

arts.ttl: Everton accused of making ‘monstrous requests’ which could scare club away
arts.sum: Everton have been accused of making ‘monstrous requests’ for striker Beto which could end up scaring away Torino this month. Tuttomercatoweb report that Everton are running the risk of scaring away the main suitor for Beto if they don’t show a willingness to change. Beto has been heavily linked with a move back to Italy The post Everton accused of making ‘monstrous requests’ which could scare club away appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Everton sent 'enough' message as Sean Dyche sack decision looms
arts.sum: The new owners are considering a change of manager
